sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n103892" key="tiaro/desmon" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τῐᾱρό-δεσμον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n103892.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">band for fastening the tiara behind</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1620.tlg001:7:11:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Polyaen.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.11.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
